metadata.description: Orbit plugins for OpenClaw — relationship intelligence from your messaging + calendar data.

plugins.name: orbit
plugins.description: Automatic relationship graph builder. Ingests WhatsApp, Calendar, Gmail, Slack, Linear. Delivers pre-meeting briefs and going-cold digests. Exposes 8 tools (orbit_lookup, orbit_person_card, orbit_going_cold, orbit_graph_stats, orbit_status, orbit_network_search, orbit_ingest, orbit_log_interaction).
